name: The Sim Club
address: 1507 S Michigan Ave Unit 1S, Chicago, IL 60605
about: The Sim Club is a members-only indoor golf simulator club with two locations in Chicago: Fulton Market and South Loop. It operates as a self-serve facility designed for flexible, year-round golfing with 24/7 keyless access. Members can book simulators online for a maximum of two hours per day, with the ability to cancel or reschedule at any time. The club emphasizes a hassle-free experience, requiring no staff and allowing members to simply show up and play. For detailed pricing and membership information, users are directed to click the 'Join' option on the website. The space features 10x16 foot bays equipped with comfortable couches, 135-inch laser TVs, and state-of-the-art technology for an immersive golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art dual high-speed camera systems for precise ball and club tracking
24/7 self-serve access with flexible online booking and cancellation
Professional-level swing analysis with ultra-slow-motion playback technology
GSPro software with 4K graphics and over 1,000 world-class courses

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: High-performance launch monitor with dual high-speed camera systems

faq.answer: The website does not specify whether members need to bring their own clubs or if rentals are available.

faq.answer: No specific policy is mentioned regarding outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimate for playing 18 holes, but members are limited to two hours per booking.

faq.answer: The Sim Club is described as a members-only indoor golf simulator club with no specific mention of kid-friendly features or policies.
